summary.shape_sentence: Opening liquidation into a deep 10:00 low, strong V-recovery into early afternoon, then afternoon rollover with a late rebound that still closed below the open.

goat.note: Opening liquidation from roughly 25920s into the 25760s was the standout move of the day.

red_circles.behavior: Best bearish behavior came from the opening breakdown and afternoon lower-high failure near 25920-25940 supply.

green_circles.behavior: Bullish behavior appeared mainly at exhaustion lows around 10:00 and 15:35; longs were reversal-based rather than trend-continuation.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Supply around 25920-25940 was tested midday/early afternoon and largely respected.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand around 25760-25805 held the morning low and supported the late-day rebound.

time_markers.10am_blue: Price was near the session low after the opening liquidation; selling pressure was peaking.
time_markers.12pm_red: Price had recovered into the upper half of the morning range and was rotating constructively.
time_markers.2pm_green: Price was losing momentum from the upper balance and starting the afternoon rollover.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Price closed near 25877 after a sharp late rebound, still below the RTH open.

takeaway: Bearish opening-liquidation day with a strong mid-session V-recovery that failed at upper supply; useful comparison for early panic reversal days where afternoon sellers still control the close.
